markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Coordinate article feedback process and align on content strategy for Clerk's AI-generated articles.](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Clerk aims to focus on upper-funnel, non-branded content to fill a gap in their current content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Technical accuracy and alignment with Clerk's product vision are key concerns for the engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [GrowthX will conduct a product deep-dive with Clerk's engineering team to better understand the product and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [The SSO article will be revised, and two new articles will be reviewed by Clerk's content engineer](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Clerk wants to focus on upper-funnel, non-branded content to complement their existing blog](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [GrowthX will avoid Clerk-specific topics for now and concentrate on generic, high-level content](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Brian (content engineer) will continue to focus on Clerk-related content](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Alex will review approved topics in Airtable to ensure they align with the upper-funnel strategy](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

### Technical Accuracy Concerns

  - [Inaccuracies and technical nuances in the SSO draft were major concerns for Clerk's leadership](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Clerk's head of engineering (Jeff) will parallel-path some topics to compare with GrowthX's output](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [GrowthX will involve technical reviewers in the content creation process to improve accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)

### Product Deep-Dive

  - [GrowthX missed conducting a deep-dive on Clerk's product, features, and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [A 30-minute call with Jeff (head of engineering) or Brian (content engineer) will be scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [The call will cover product details, roadmap, engineering perspective on personas, and customer base](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Brian will review the next two articles (starting with "Top Authentication Vulnerabilities")](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [The "Scaling Authentication" article will be rerun with updated keywords and focus on Next.js](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [SSO article revision expected by mid-week (Wednesday at the latest)](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)

### AI-Generated Content Expectations

  - [Clerk's leadership initially expected highly polished content on the first pass](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Alex reset expectations, emphasizing the iterative nature of the process](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Content is primarily aimed at increasing visibility among LLMs, not matching blog quality](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alex to check Jeff's availability for a product deep-dive call with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [GrowthX to rerun the "Scaling Authentication" article with updated keywords and Next.js focus](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Brian to review "Top Authentication Vulnerabilities" article](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver revised SSO article by mid-week](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [Alex to review approved topics in Airtable to ensure alignment with upper-funnel strategy](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement new agentic workflows, including a fact-checker for specific personas](https://fathom.video/share/mXyC7S83x6xDL45sRTsTRAVzKAZ9yjBe?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
